nasb.text: For I was in fact kidnapped from the land of the Hebrews, and even here I have done nothing that they should have put me into the dungeon.”

esv.text: For I was indeed stolen out of the land of the Hebrews, and here also I have done nothing that they should put me into the pit.”

cnv.text: 我實在是從希伯來人之地被拐來；就是在這裡，我也沒有作過甚麼事該被關在監牢裡的。”

ccb.text: 我是从希伯来人那里被拐来的，无辜被囚在监。”

csbs.text: 因为我实在是从希伯来人之地被拐来的，就是在这里我也没做过什么事，致使他们把我关在这地牢里。”
